ticket:
Hello,

My name is Emily Johnson.
Email: emily.johnson@email.com

Order 88771 stopped working after three months.

I would like to claim my warranty.

plan.reason: Customer is claiming warranty for a non-functional order

classification.reason: Customer is reporting a product malfunction and wants to claim warranty

email.subject: Re: Warranty Claim for Order 88771
email.body: Dear Emily Johnson, thank you for reaching out. I've checked on the status of your order 88771, and it shows as delivered. I'm happy to assist you with your warranty claim. Please allow me to look into this further.
